chat.author: Éric Vyncke
chat.text: Thanks Christian for being the note taker (only on the Q&A part)

chat.author: Carles Gomez
chat.text: @Christian Great, thanks for the information! RFC 8105 is a related 6lo document (IPv6 over DECT-ULE)

chat.author: Christian Amsüss
chat.text: The new DECT nr+ ecosystem is almost completely distinct from the prior work. (But the ETSI authors probably learned from ETSI-ULA).

chat.author: Alexander Pelov
chat.text: DECT nr+ looks quite promising. That's an interesting work, thanks Christian

chat.author: Alexander Pelov
chat.text:
I think it would be really useful for the WG to read the GAAO document and provide feedback on the wording / scope 
one or two reviews would help the authors, in my oppinion

chat.author: Éric Vyncke
chat.text: Not a WG document, so, it should rather be the author to send this email (about getting SCHC assistance)
